name: Atik Jawad
title: Senior Lecturer
department: Bachelor of Science in Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE)
bio_raw: Mr. Atik Jawad has been working as a Lecturer in the department of EEE at ULAB since February, 2022. He has also worked as a part-time lecturer at ULAB from October, 2021. Furthermore, he contributed as an adjunct lecturer in the Textile Machinery Design and Maintenance (TMDM) department, EEE Section, at Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX). He is currently the advisor of ULAB Electronics and Robotics Club (UERC). He is also the convener of the event committee, EEE, ULAB. He completed his M.Sc. and B.Sc. in EEE from Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET). As a dedicated researcher, he has authored multiple Q1 journal articles and international conference papers, earning four best paper awards. He actively contributes as a reviewer for various journals and international conferences. His research interests include power system dynamics and control, frequency stability, renewable energy integration with a focus on photovoltaic systems, artificial intelligence in power systems, and sustainable energy generation and management. He is also a valued member of IEEE, Bangladesh Section.
stated_interests: Power System Stability, Renewable Energy Integration, Photovoltaic Systems, Frequency Stability, Energy Storage Systems, Artificial Intelligence in Power System, Deep Learning, Solar Cells, Sustainable Energy Generation.
